data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 1, 2026, an inventor from Running Springs, California, expressed the intention to introduce an improved drainage solution for both residential and commercial use that is simple to set up. data.title: EKA Mobility Achieves 5x Volume Growth
data.description: In Pune, India, on April 1, 2026, EKA Mobility, a prominent electric vehicles and technology firm, revealed a noteworthy 5X increase in year-on-year volume in FY 2025–26, having sold 1,143 units and manufactured 1,344 electric commercial vehicles. This achievement follows a significant...

data.title: Jones Walker Expands Tax Practice and Employee Benefits Team with Two Miami Attorneys
data.description: Today, Jones Walker LLP, a law firm based in Miami, welcomed two additional attorneys to their team. Pedro Herrera, now a partner, and Madison Levine, a special counsel, have joined the Tax Practice Group and employee benefits team in the Miami office. The firm expressed their satisfaction with the new additions and looks forward to their contributions.

data.title: The Cook & Boardman Group Acquires Assurance Media
data.description: A leading provider of fully integrated access and security solutions, Cook & Boardman, is expanding its reach across the nation. The company recently announced plans for nationwide expansion to deliver innovative and secure opening solutions. Based in Winston-Salem, N.C., Cook & Boardman aims to offer its services to a wider audience. This development comes as part of the company's strategic growth initiative. On April 1, 2026, the Cook & Boardman Group LLC shared this news, highlighting its commitment to providing cutting-edge security solutions to customers nationwide.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Curtis Ostler Breaks Down Car Insurance Coverage Options for Utah Drivers
data.description: An article delves into the importance of having sufficient auto insurance coverage to protect drivers in South Jordan, Utah from potential financial risks. Addressing liability coverage, collision coverage, and other protective measures, it highlights the potential pitfalls of relying solely on the state minimum requirements. Released on April 1, 2026, this information from HelloNation emphasizes the need for comprehensive insurance strategies to avoid expensive coverage gaps in South Jordan.

data.title: AGI Announces AGM Date and Responds to Plantro News Release
data.description: Ag Growth International Inc. (TSX: AFN) has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGM) to take place on June 4, 2026, at 9:00 am Central Standard Time at the company's headquarters in Winnipeg. The record date for the AGM is set for April 30, 2026. The proposed board slate for this year consists of five incumbent directors.

data.title: Green Courte Partners Acquires Expansion Site Adjacent to Existing Industrial Outdoor Storage Property in Nashville, Tennessee, MSA
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Green Courte Partners, LLC, a private equity firm specializing in real estate investments, unveiled the launch of its sixth investment fund, Green Courte Real Estate Partners VI, LLC. The firm focuses on developing top-tier companies in specialized real estate sectors.

data.title: Registration Open for The 2026 Externship: The Premier Virtual Financial Planning Training Program Returns for Its Seventh Year
data.description: With anticipation for its biggest group to date, The 2026 Externship is set to unveil a novel mobile education tool, partnered with two prominent tech companies, and will showcase two client case studies illustrating intricate planning situations. Releasing this news from Dallas on April 1, 2026, Amplified Planning revealed their latest enhancements.
